{{Concept | Name=Chimpanzee | Guid=3015-13623 | Deck=A species of great ape native to the forests and savannahs of tropical Africa. | Characters=Characters/Bubbles_12409,Characters/Chimpan_Z,Characters/Chimpy,Characters/Detective_Chimp,Characters/Perman_2,Characters/Reptile,Characters/The_Chimp,Characters/Utan | Concepts=Concepts/Animality,Concepts/Apes,Concepts/Chimchar | Franchises= | Games=Games/Banjo_Kazooie,Games/Chimpact,Games/Chimpology,Games/Dakkoshite_Chimpanzee,Games/DC_Universe_Online,Games/Doraemon_Dorayaki_Shop_Story,Games/Grand_Prix_Story_2,Games/Hail_to_the_Chimp,Games/LEGO_Batman_3_Beyond_Gotham,Games/LEGO_DC_Super_Villains,Games/Metal_Slug_3,Games/Metal_Slug_Anthology,Games/Metal_Slug_Defense,Games/Michael_Jacksons_Moonwalker,Games/Mortal_Kombat_Legacy_Kollection,Games/Mortal_Kombat_Trilogy,Games/NeoGeo_Arcade_3,Games/Perman_Part_2_Himitsu_Kessha_Madoodan_o_Taose,Games/Picross_S_Doraemon_And_F_Characters_edition,Games/Rare_Replay,Games/Scribblenauts_Mega_Pack,Games/Scribblenauts_Unmasked_A_DC_Comics_Adventure,Games/Space_Chimps,Games/Super_Mario_Galaxy_2,Games/Super_Mario_Galaxy_Super_Mario_Galaxy_2,Games/The_Outfoxies,Games/Ultimate_Mortal_Kombat,Games/Ultimate_Mortal_Kombat_3,Games/Vigilante_8_2nd_Offense,Games/Wild_Thornberrys_Chimp_Chase | Locations=Locations/Africa,Locations/Jungle | Objects=Objects/Banana,Objects/Feces,Objects/Stick,Objects/Tree | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3807562-5888280882-enlarged.png}}

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Concept | Name=Chinese Mythology | Guid=3015-13285 | Deck=Games, characters, events, items, locations, and more that are based on any of the myths, legends, and religions of China from throughout history. | Characters=Characters/Azure_Lion,Characters/Baihu,Characters/Baiyi_Xiushi,Characters/Bishamonten,Characters/Budai,Characters/Bull_Demon_King,Characters/Change,Characters/Chi_Chi_DBZ,Characters/Chi_You,Characters/Cho_Hakkai,Characters/Confucius,Characters/Da_Ji,Characters/Da_Peng,Characters/Da_Yu,Characters/Datsue_ba,Characters/Erlang_Shen,Characters/Fu_Xi,Characters/Ginkaku,Characters/Goku,Characters/Gozu_Tennoh,Characters/Gozuki,Characters/Guan_Yu,Characters/Hanuman,Characters/Heifeng_Guai,Characters/Huangmei_Dawang,Characters/Jikokuten,Characters/Jinchi_Elder,Characters/Kanzeon,Characters/King_of_Spiritual_Touch,Characters/Kinkaku,Characters/Kinnara,Characters/Koriki_Taisen,Characters/Koumokuten,Characters/Kundali,Characters/Lady_Earth_Flow,Characters/Lady_Tessen,Characters/Lao_Tzu,Characters/Leizhenzi,Characters/Ling_Xuzi,Characters/Lord_Taurus,Characters/Mazu,Characters/Mezuki,Characters/Monkey_King_37359,Characters/Ne_Zha,Characters/Nio,Characters/Nu_Wa,Characters/Ox_King,Characters/Pigsy,Characters/Preta,Characters/Princess_Iron_Fan,Characters/Qilin,Characters/Qing_Long,Characters/Red_Boy,Characters/Rokuriki_Taisen,Characters/Rokuten_Maoh,Characters/Sa_Gojo,Characters/Sanzo,Characters/Scorpion_Demoness,Characters/Seimen_Kongou,Characters/Sha_Wujing,Characters/Shu_Ryorin,Characters/Siddhartha_Gautama,Characters/Six_eared_Macaque,Characters/Son_Goku,Characters/Son_Gokuu,Characters/SonSon,Characters/SonSon_24556,Characters/Sun_Wukong,Characters/Sun_Wukong_41086,Characters/Tiger_Vanguard,Characters/White_Dragon_Horse,Characters/Wu_Kong,Characters/Wujing,Characters/Wukong,Characters/Wukong_Junior,Characters/Wukong_the_Monkey_King,Characters/Xing_Tian,Characters/Xuan_Wu,Characters/Xuanzang,Characters/Yama,Characters/Yellow_Toothed_Elephant,Characters/Yinglong,Characters/Yoriki_Taisen,Characters/Yuebei_Xing,Characters/Zaou_Gongen,Characters/Zhong_Kui,Characters/Zhu_Que,Characters/Zouchouten {{Concept | Name=Chrome Engine 6 | Guid=3015-13260 | Deck=The next iteration of the Chrome Engine 5, Dying Light is the first game to use the engine. Later both Dead Island Definitive Edition and Dead Island Riptide Definitive Edition used this engine to remastered original games' lighting, Chrome Engine 6 is also seen in Dying Light's DLCs, Expansions and community custom maps | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Chrome_Engine_1,Concepts/Chrome_Engine_2,Concepts/Chrome_Engine_3,Concepts/Chrome_Engine_4,Concepts/Chrome_Engine_5,Concepts/Chrome_Engine_6,Concepts/Durability,Concepts/Eating,Concepts/Experience_Points,Concepts/Fetch_Quest,Concepts/First_Person_Perspective,Concepts/Kill_Quest,Concepts/Level_Up,Concepts/Open_World,Concepts/Polygonal_3D,Concepts/Quest_Tracking,Concepts/Questing,Concepts/RPG_Elements,Concepts/Sandbox,Concepts/Skill_Tree,Concepts/Useable_Vehicles,Concepts/Zombie | Franchises= | Games=Games/Dead_Island_Definitive_Collection,Games/Dying_Light | Locations= | Objects=Objects/Explosives,Objects/Gun,Objects/Knife,Objects/Throwing_Knife | People= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"1847611-techland.jpg","path":"11\/116631\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_avatar,scale_small,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_medium,screen_medium,scale_large,scale_avatar,square_small,square_medium,scale_super,scale_tiny,screen_kubrick","caption":"Techland's Current Logo"},"background":[]}' /> The next iteration of the Chrome Engine 5, Dying Light is the first game to use the engine. Later both Dead Island Definitive Edition and Dead Island Riptide Definitive Edition used this engine to remastered original games' lighting, Chrome Engine 6 is also seen in Dying Light's DLCs, Expansions and community custom maps

{{Concept | Name=Citroën | Guid=3015-13322 | Deck=Citroën is a French automobile brand. The "Automobiles Citroën" manufacturing company was founded on 4 June 1919 by André Citroën. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Licensed_Cars,Concepts/The_1910s | Franchises= | Games=Games/Gran_Turismo_2,Games/Gran_Turismo_3_A_Spec,Games/Gran_Turismo_4,Games/Gran_Turismo_5,Games/Gran_Turismo_6,Games/Gran_Turismo_7,Games/Michelin_Rally_Masters_Race_of_Champions,Games/WRC_II_Extreme | Locations=Locations/France | Objects=Objects/Citroen_2CV,Objects/Citroen_C2_Super_1600,Objects/Citroen_C4_Concept_Car,Objects/Citroen_Saxo,Objects/Citroen_Saxo_Kitcar,Objects/Citroen_Xsara,Objects/Citroen_Xsara_4x4_T16 | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3662045-2218901892-34653.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3662045-2218901892-34653.jpg","path":"151\/1511438\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_tiny,square_medium,square_avatar,square_small,scale_small,scale_super,scale_medium,scale_avatar,square_mini,screen_medium,scale_large,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Citroën is a French automobile brand. The "Automobiles Citroën" manufacturing company was founded on 4 June 1919 by André Citroën.

{{Concept | Name=Clodsire | Guid=3015-13280 | Deck=Clodsire is the evolution of Paldea Wooper. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Evolution,Concepts/Gotta_catch_em_all,Concepts/Ground_type_Pokemon,Concepts/Poison,Concepts/Poison_type_Pokemon,Concepts/Pokemon,Concepts/Pokemon_Battle,Concepts/Pokemon_Trainer,Concepts/Salamanders,Concepts/Wooper | Franchises= | Games=Games/Pokemon_Cafe_Mix,Games/Pokemon_Go,Games/Pokemon_Scarlet_Violet | Locations=Locations/Paldea | Objects=Objects/Mud,Objects/Poke_Ball | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3625277-1643441446-0980C.png}}

{{Concept | Name=Cogs | Guid=3015-13455 | Deck=The standard minion flunkies of the Machine Empire, usually used to wear down the Power Rangers before they take on a more powerful threat. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Minions,Concepts/Robot | Franchises= | Games=Games/Power_Rangers_Zeo_Versus_The_Machine_Empire,Games/Sabans_Power_Rangers_Zeo_Battle_Racers | Locations= | Objects=Objects/Motorcycle,Objects/Spear | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3723081-8736624492-latest.png}}

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Concept | Name=Compsognathus | Guid=3015-13613 | Deck=A species of small, carnivorous dinosaurs that lived on Earth near the end of the Jurassic period. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Dinosaur | Franchises= | Games=Games/Dino_Crisis,Games/Dino_Crisis_2,Games/Jurassic_Park,Games/Jurassic_Park_2011,Games/Jurassic_Park_Builder,Games/Jurassic_Park_III,Games/Jurassic_Park_III_Danger_Zone,Games/Jurassic_Park_III_Dino_Defender,Games/Jurassic_Park_III_Park_Builder,Games/Jurassic_Park_Survival_32826,Games/Jurassic_World_Aftermath,Games/Jurassic_World_Alive,Games/Jurassic_World_Evolution,Games/Jurassic_World_Evolution_2,Games/Jurassic_World_Evolution_3,Games/Jurassic_World_The_Game,Games/LEGO_Jurassic_World,Games/Primal_Carnage_Extinction,Games/The_Lost_World_Jurassic_Park_1997,Games/The_Lost_World_Jurassic_Park_4125,Games/Turok_Evolution,Games/Warpath_Jurassic_Park | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3793349-compsognathus.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3793349-compsognathus.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,scale_super,scale_medium,square_tiny,scale_small,square_avatar,square_mini,scale_tiny,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> There is also a very similar species Procompsognathus. In games it is unlikely that the exact name of the species will be given so they may be conflated.

<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Concept | Name=Create an Animation | Guid=3015-13297 | Deck=Games that let you create your own trick/moves/taunts. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Create_A_Mode | Franchises= | Games=Games/AND_1_Streetball,Games/Fighter_Maker,Games/Fighter_Maker_2,Games/NBA_ShootOut_2002,Games/NBA_ShootOut_2004,Games/Tony_Hawks_American_Wasteland,Games/Tony_Hawks_Underground,Games/Tony_Hawks_Underground_2,Games/WWE_12,Games/WWE_13,Games/WWE_2K14,Games/WWE_SmackDown_Here_Comes_the_Pain,Games/WWE_SmackDown_Shut_Your_Mouth,Games/WWE_SmackDown_vs_RAW_2009,Games/WWE_SmackDown_vs_RAW_2010,Games/WWE_SmackDown_vs_RAW_2011,Games/WWF_SmackDown_Just_Bring_It | Locations= | Objects= | People= }}

<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Concept | Name=Croquet | Guid=3015-13467 | Deck=A lawn sport where you take turns using a mallet to smack your balls through a set of hoops. Multiple rule variants have existed throughout history, including the Japanese "gateball". | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Appare_Gateball,Games/Hellow_Gateball,Games/Simple_1500_Series_Vol_23_The_Gateball | Locations= | Objects= | People= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> A lawn sport where you take turns using a mallet to smack your balls through a set of hoops. Multiple rule variants have existed throughout history, including the Japanese "gateball".

{{Concept | Name=Darkspine | Guid=3015-13371 | Deck=Darkspine is a less-than-heroic transformation of Sonic the Hedgehog, from Sonic and the Secret Rings. | Characters=Characters/Sonic_the_Hedgehog | Concepts=Concepts/Corruption,Concepts/Super_Form | Franchises= | Games=Games/Sonic_and_the_Black_Knight,Games/Sonic_and_the_Secret_Rings,Games/Sonic_Dash,Games/Sonic_Forces_Speed_Battle | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3664817-5653404140-latest.png}}

{{Concept | Name=Death by Train | Guid=3015-13380 | Deck=A plot contrivance or gameplay opportunity for some characters to die in the game by being hit by a moving train or streetcar | Characters=Characters/Heather_Mason,Characters/Lara_Croft,Characters/Omni_Man | Concepts=Concepts/Blood,Concepts/Death,Concepts/Plot_Twist,Concepts/Train_Level,Concepts/Train_Wreck | Franchises= | Games=Games/007_The_World_is_Not_Enough,Games/Alice_Madness_Returns,Games/Batman_Forever,Games/Covert_Ops_Nuclear_Dawn,Games/Def_Jam_Fight_for_NY,Games/Descent_3,Games/Grand_Theft_Auto_IV,Games/Grand_Theft_Auto_V,Games/Half_Life_2,Games/Mortal_Kombat_1,Games/Mortal_Kombat_2011,Games/Mortal_Kombat_3,Games/Mortal_Kombat_Armageddon,Games/Mortal_Kombat_Trilogy,Games/OverBlood,Games/Silent_Hill_3,Games/Soldier_of_Fortune_2000,Games/Tomb_Raider_III_Adventures_of_Lara_Croft,Games/Turok_3_Shadow_of_Oblivion,Games/Ultimate_Mortal_Kombat,Games/Ultimate_Mortal_Kombat_3,Games/Viewtiful_Joe | Locations=Locations/Subway_3041,Locations/Train_3062,Locations/Train_Station | Objects=Objects/Corpse,Objects/Rail_Track,Objects/Railroad_Crossing,Objects/Train | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3673485-silenthill3.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3673485-silenthill3.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_medium,square_small,square_avatar,scale_super,scale_medium,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_small,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,scale_tiny,screen_medium","caption":"Silent Hill 3"},"background":[]}' /> A plot contrivance or gameplay opportunity for some characters to die in the game by being hit by a moving train or streetcar

{{Concept | Name=Dementors | Guid=3015-13648 | Deck=Wraith-like beings from the world of Harry Potter, they are the guards of Azakaban but are also sent to pursue escaped fugitives like Sirius Black. They feed on misery and unhappiness, and torture their victims by forcing them to relive their worst, most unhappy memories while draining them. While overall immune to harm, they can be repelled with a Patronus charm. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Faceless_Villain,Concepts/Flight,Concepts/Torture,Concepts/Unbeatable_Enemy,Concepts/Wraith | Franchises= | Games=Games/Harry_Potter_and_the_Prisoner_of_Azkaban,Games/Hogwarts_Legacy,Games/LEGO_Harry_Potter_Collection,Games/LEGO_Harry_Potter_Years_1_4,Games/LEGO_Harry_Potter_Years_5_7 | Locations=Locations/Hogwarts_Castle,Locations/United_Kingdom | Objects=Objects/Robe | People= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> Wraith-like beings from the world of Harry Potter, they are the guards of Azakaban but are also sent to pursue escaped fugitives like Sirius Black. They feed on misery and unhappiness, and torture their victims by forcing them to relive their worst, most unhappy memories while draining them. While overall immune to harm, they can be repelled with a Patronus charm.

{{Concept | Name=Dianamon | Guid=3015-13431 | Deck=Dianamon is a Mega-level Shaman Digimon and a member of the Olympos XII. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Cryokinesis,Concepts/Digimon,Concepts/Digivolution,Concepts/Hypnosis,Concepts/Rabbits,Concepts/Taomon,Concepts/Water_Manipulation | Franchises= | Games=Games/Digimon_Heroes,Games/Digimon_Links,Games/Digimon_ReArise,Games/Digimon_Soul_Chaser,Games/Digimon_Story_Cyber_Sleuth,Games/Digimon_Story_Cyber_Sleuth_Complete_Edition,Games/Digimon_Story_Cyber_Sleuth_Hackers_Memory,Games/Digimon_Story_Lost_Evolution,Games/Digimon_Story_Super_Xros_Wars_Blue_Red,Games/Digimon_Story_Time_Stranger,Games/Digimon_World_Championship,Games/Digimon_World_Dusk_Dawn,Games/Digimon_World_Next_Order | Locations=Locations/Cyberspace,Locations/The_Moon | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3727064-6258980117-320px.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3727064-6258980117-320px.jpg","path":"16\/164924\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_medium,square_avatar,square_medium,square_small,scale_small,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_super,scale_avatar,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_tiny,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Dianamon is a Mega-level Shaman Digimon and a member of the Olympos XII.

{{Concept | Name=Dilophosaurus | Guid=3015-13614 | Deck=A species of theropod dinosaurs that are most notable due their double crested heads. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Boss_Fight,Concepts/Dinosaur | Franchises= | Games=Games/Funko_Fusion,Games/Jurassic_Park,Games/Jurassic_Park_2011,Games/Jurassic_Park_73443,Games/Jurassic_Park_Arcade,Games/Jurassic_Park_Builder,Games/Jurassic_Park_Dinosaur_Battles,Games/Jurassic_Park_III,Games/Jurassic_Park_III_Island_Attack,Games/Jurassic_Park_III_Park_Builder,Games/Jurassic_Park_III_The_DNA_Factor,Games/Jurassic_Park_Interactive,Games/Jurassic_Park_Operation_Genesis,Games/Jurassic_Park_Survival,Games/Jurassic_World_Aftermath,Games/Jurassic_World_Alive,Games/Jurassic_World_Evolution,Games/Jurassic_World_Evolution_2,Games/Jurassic_World_Evolution_3,Games/Jurassic_World_The_Game,Games/LEGO_Brawls,Games/LEGO_Jurassic_World,Games/Stumble_Guys_Multiplayer_Royale,Games/The_Lost_World_Jurassic_Park_1997 | Locations=Locations/Isla_Sorna | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3793664-dilophosaurus.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3793664-dilophosaurus.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,scale_super,scale_medium,square_tiny,scale_small,square_avatar,square_mini,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A species of theropod dinosaurs that are most notable due their double crested heads.

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Concept | Name=Dimetrodon | Guid=3015-13612 | Deck=An extinct synapsid that lived on Earth during the Early Permian period around 280 million years ago. It is recognizable due to it's spinal sail, but it is not a dinoasaur as it existed 40 million years before dinosaurs. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Dinosaur | Franchises= | Games=Games/ARK_Survival_Evolved,Games/Carnivores_2,Games/Carnivores_Dinosaur_Hunter_HD,Games/Jurassic_Park,Games/Jurassic_Park_III_Park_Builder,Games/Jurassic_World_Alive,Games/Jurassic_World_Evolution_2,Games/Jurassic_World_The_Game,Games/The_Isle,Games/The_Lost_World_Jurassic_Park_4125,Games/Turok_Dinosaur_Hunter,Games/Zoo_Tycoon_2_Extinct_Animals | Locations=Locations/Italy | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3793348-dimetrodon.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3793348-dimetrodon.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,scale_super,scale_medium,square_tiny,scale_small,square_avatar,screen_medium,square_mini,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> With the Hardcore difficulty mode introduced in Night Dive Studios' HD remaster, the ''Dimetrodon'' has become a faster predator and can withstand much more damage. They have also received a speed enhancement allowing it to move, attack, and react faster.

{{Concept | Name=Dingo | Guid=3015-13407 | Deck=An Australian canid. | Characters=Characters/Dingodile | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Lenny_Loosejocks_in_Space,Games/Planet_Zoo | Locations=Locations/Australia | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/59/594908/3695820-7185134315-image.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3695820-7185134315-image.jpg","path":"59\/594908\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_avatar,square_medium,scale_medium,scale_small,scale_super,square_small,square_tiny,scale_tiny,scale_large,square_mini,screen_medium,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> An Australian canid.

{{Concept | Name=Dipplin | Guid=3015-13581 | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Pokemon_Scarlet_Violet | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/13/135472/3777906-1280px-1011dipplin.png}}

<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Concept | Name=Dodge | Guid=3015-13335 | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Gran_Turismo | Locations= | Objects= | People= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Concept | Name=Dodon Ray | Guid=3015-13472 | Aliases=Dodon Wave,Dodonpa | Deck=The Dodon Ray, also known as the Dodon Wave, and Dodonpa in Japanese, is a thin beam ki attack utilized by the Crane School in Dragon Ball. | Characters=Characters/Ace_39661,Characters/Cell,Characters/Chiaotzu,Characters/Master_Roshi,Characters/Master_Shen,Characters/Shallot,Characters/Tao_Pai_Pai,Characters/Tien | Concepts=Concepts/Ki | Franchises= | Games=Games/Dragon_Ball,Games/Dragon_Ball_Advanced_Adventure,Games/Dragon_Ball_Daimaou_Fukkatsu,Games/Dragon_Ball_FighterZ,Games/Dragon_Ball_Heroes,Games/Dragon_Ball_Heroes_Ultimate_Mission,Games/Dragon_Ball_Kai_Ultimate_Butouden,Games/Dragon_Ball_Online,Games/Dragon_Ball_Origins_2,Games/Dragon_Ball_Raging_Blast,Games/Dragon_Ball_Raging_Blast_2,Games/Dragon_Ball_Revenge_of_King_Piccolo,Games/Dragon_Ball_Super_Divers,Games/Dragon_Ball_The_Breakers,Games/Dragon_Ball_Xenoverse,Games/Dragon_Ball_Xenoverse_2,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Budokai,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Budokai_2,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Budokai_3,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Budokai_HD_Collection,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Budokai_Tenkaichi,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Budokai_Tenkaichi_2,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Budokai_Tenkaichi_3,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Burst_Limit,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Chou_Saiya_Densetsu,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Idainaru_Son_Goku_Densetsu,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_II_Gekigami_Freezer,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Infinite_World,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Kakarot,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Kyoushuu_Saiyajin,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Sagas,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Shin_Butoden,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Tenkaichi_Tag_Team,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Ultimate_Battle_22,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_Ultimate_Tenkaichi,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_W_Bakuretsu_Impact,Games/Dragon_Ball_Zenkai_Battle_Royal,Games/DragonBall_Heroes_Ultimate_Mission_2,Games/DragonBall_Heroes_Ultimate_Mission_X,Games/DragonBall_Z_Dokkan_Battle,Games/Super_Dragon_Ball_Heroes_World_Mission | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3751501-1293202555-latest.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3751501-1293202555-latest.png","path":"16\/164924\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_medium,scale_super,scale_small,square_small,square_avatar,square_medium,scale_tiny,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,square_mini,square_tiny","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The Dodon Ray, also known as the Dodon Wave, and Dodonpa in Japanese, is a thin beam ki attack utilized by the Crane School in Dragon Ball.

{{Concept | Name=Dondozo | Guid=3015-13550 | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Pokemon_Scarlet_Violet | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/13/135472/3777864-0977dondozo.png}}

{{Concept | Name=Download Required Physical Release | Guid=3015-13449 | Deck=These games are not completed on cartridge/disc. | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Assassins_Creed_Shadows,Games/Baldurs_Gate_3,Games/Bravely_Default_Flying_Fairy,Games/Call_of_Duty_Black_Ops_6,Games/Disgaea_7_Vows_of_the_Virtueless,Games/EA_Sports_FC_24,Games/EA_Sports_FC_25,Games/Grand_Theft_Auto_The_Trilogy_The_Definitive_Edition,Games/L_A_Noire,Games/Madden_NFL_26,Games/MLB_The_Show_22,Games/MLB_The_Show_23,Games/MLB_The_Show_24,Games/MLB_The_Show_25,Games/Pokemon_Pokopia,Games/Puyo_Puyo_Tetris_2_The_Ultimate_Puzzle_Match,Games/Spyro_Reignited_Trilogy,Games/Star_Wars_Outlaws,Games/Starlink_Battle_for_Atlas,Games/Street_Fighter_6,Games/Survival_Kids_2025,Games/Tony_Hawks_Pro_Skater_5,Games/Wolfenstein_II_The_New_Colossus,Games/Yakuza_0 | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/59/594908/3718110-0695650273-survi.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3718110-0695650273-survi.jpg","path":"59\/594908\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,scale_small,scale_super,scale_medium,square_mini,square_avatar,screen_medium,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_tiny,square_tiny","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> These games are not completed on cartridge/disc.

{{Concept | Name=Drag Racing | Guid=3015-13470 | Deck=Focused on pure acceleration, drag racing is a type of automobile racing where racers compete neck-to-neck in a straight stretch of road (usually a quarter of a mile long), usually with specially-modified cars (most commonly "dragsters"). | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Age_Age_The_Zero_Yon_Shinya,Games/Burnout_Championship_Drag_Racing,Games/Drag_Racing,Games/Dragster,Games/IHRA_Drag_Racing_2004,Games/IHRA_Drag_Racing_Sportsman_Edition,Games/IHRA_Motorsports,Games/IHRA_Motorsports_Drag_Racing,Games/IHRA_Professional_Drag_Racing_2005,Games/Mario_Party_4,Games/NHRA_Championship_Drag_Racing,Games/NHRA_Championship_Drag_Racing_Speed_For_All,Games/NHRA_Drag_Racing,Games/NHRA_Drag_Racing_2,Games/NHRA_Drag_Racing_Countdown_to_the_Championship,Games/NHRA_Drag_Racing_Main_Event,Games/NIRA_Intense_Import_Drag_Racing,Games/Puzzle_And_Action_Ichidant_R,Games/SEGA_AGES_2500_Vol_6_Puzzle_And_Action_Bonanza_Bros,Games/Simple_1500_Series_Vol_78_The_Zero_Yon,Games/Total_Adrenaline_3D_Drag_Racing | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/1/14206/1080311-d3.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"1080311-d3.jpg","path":"1\/14206\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_avatar,screen_medium,scale_large,scale_small,square_mini,square_tiny,square_medium,scale_super,scale_medium,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,scale_tiny,square_small","caption":""},"background":[]}' /> Focused on pure acceleration, drag racing is a type of automobile racing where racers compete neck-to-neck in a straight stretch of road (usually a quarter of a mile long), usually with specially-modified cars (most commonly "dragsters").

{{Concept | Name=Drunk | Guid=3015-13249 | Aliases=Willy Whistle,Bonner,Borracho | Deck=Drunks are a common enemy in the Bubble Bobble series and one of the more recognizable recurring characters of the franchise. | Characters=Characters/Hyper_Drunk,Characters/Robin_Smith,Characters/Super_Drunk,Characters/Super_Drunk_Jr | Concepts=Concepts/Magic,Concepts/Recurring_Minion | Franchises= | Games=Games/Arkanoid_vs_Space_Invaders,Games/Bubble_Bobble,Games/Bubble_Bobble_4_Friends,Games/Bubble_Bobble_also_featuring_Rainbow_Islands,Games/Bubble_Bobble_Double_Shot,Games/Bubble_Bobble_Old_And_New,Games/Bubble_Bobble_Part_2,Games/Bubble_Bobble_Plus,Games/Bubble_Bobble_Revolution,Games/Bubble_Memories_The_Story_of_Bubble_Bobble_III,Games/Bubble_Symphony,Games/Bust_A_Move,Games/Bust_A_Move_2_Arcade_Edition,Games/Bust_A_Move_3_DX,Games/Bust_A_Move_4,Games/Bust_A_Move_Bash,Games/Bust_a_Move_Deluxe,Games/Bust_A_Move_Millennium,Games/Bust_A_Move_Plus,Games/Bust_A_Move_Universe,Games/Classic_Bubble_Bobble,Games/Like_a_Dragon_Gaiden_The_Man_Who_Erased_His_Name,Games/New_Bust_A_Move,Games/One_Night_Stand,Games/Popn_Pop,Games/Puzzle_Bobble_2X_Bust_A_Move_2_Arcade_Edition_And_Puzzle_Bobble_3_Bust_A_Move_3_S_Tribute,Games/Puzzle_Bobble_3D_Vacation_Odyssey,Games/Puzzle_Bobble_Everybubble,Games/Puzzle_Bobble_Pocket,Games/Rainbow_Islands,Games/Rainbow_Islands_Revolution,Games/Super_Bust_A_Move,Games/Taito_Legends,Games/Taito_Legends_2,Games/Taito_Memories,Games/Taito_Memories_Gekan,Games/Taito_Memories_II_Gekan,Games/Taito_Memories_II_Joukan,Games/Taito_Memories_Joukan,Games/Taito_Memories_Pocket,Games/Taito_Milestones_3,Games/Taito_Variety_Pack | Locations= | Objects=Objects/Bottle,Objects/Cape,Objects/Whiskey | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3610424-9699512236-latest.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3610424-9699512236-latest.png","path":"16\/164924\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_super,square_small,scale_medium,scale_small,square_avatar,square_medium,square_mini,square_tiny,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar,scale_large","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Drunks are a common enemy in the Bubble Bobble series and one of the more recognizable recurring characters of the franchise.

{{Concept | Name=Dwarfism | Guid=3015-13309 | Deck=As opposed to the fantasy race of peoples, these are characters that have a condition known as dwarfism that, among other thing, causes them to be much smaller in stature than others of their species (usually humans or humanoids in popular media). | Characters=Characters/Dr_Psycho,Characters/Hornswoggle,Characters/Iron_Man_2099,Characters/LeFou,Characters/Lil_Bub,Characters/Lord_Farquaad,Characters/Mini_Me,Characters/Nick_Nack,Characters/Tyrion_Lannister,Characters/Wee_Man | Concepts=Concepts/Dwarf,Concepts/Jester,Concepts/Joke_Character | Franchises= | Games=Games/007_Nightfire,Games/Austin_Powers_Welcome_to_My_Underground_Lair,Games/BMX_XXX,Games/Crusader_Kings,Games/DC_Universe_Online,Games/Disney_Magic_Kingdoms,Games/Disneys_Beauty_and_the_Beast_A_Board_Game_Adventure,Games/Disneys_Beauty_and_the_Beast_Belles_Quest,Games/Game_of_Thrones_A_Telltale_Game_Series,Games/Game_of_Thrones_Winter_is_Coming,Games/Jackass_The_Game,Games/Jackass_The_Game_2007,Games/Lil_Bubs_Hello_Earth,Games/Marvel_Future_Fight,Games/No_One_Lives_Forever_2_A_Spy_in_H_A_R_M_s_Way,Games/Reigns_Game_of_Thrones,Games/Scribblenauts_Mega_Pack,Games/Scribblenauts_Unmasked_A_DC_Comics_Adventure,Games/Shrek_Fairy_Tale_Freakdown,Games/Shrek_Hassle_at_the_Castle,Games/Shrek_Smash_N_Crash_Racing,Games/Shrek_Swamp_Kart_Speedway,Games/Tony_Hawks_Underground_2,Games/WWE_SmackDown_vs_RAW_2009,Games/WWE_SmackDown_vs_RAW_2010,Games/WWE_SmackDown_vs_RAW_2011 | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/37/370948/3028865-lord-farquaad-shrek-0.85.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3028865-lord-farquaad-shrek-0.85.jpg","path":"37\/370948\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_small,square_medium,square_avatar,scale_super,square_small,scale_medium,square_mini,square_tiny,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_medium,scale_tiny","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> As opposed to the fantasy race of peoples, these are characters that have a condition known as dwarfism that, among other thing, causes them to be much smaller in stature than others of their species (usually humans or humanoids in popular media).
